post.message: Net assertion count for test/e2e/app-dir/instant-validation/instant-validation-parallel-slots.test.ts dropped by 4 after this PR. Assertions were removed without equivalents added back.
post.judgeRationale: judge refuted the block: The assertions were removed because the error message format was changed from "Could not validate instant UI" to "Could not validate that a segment in your UI has instant navigation", and the new tests in `errors.test.ts` verify the new parsing logic.
